title: Frontend Developer Roadmap
description: A comprehensive roadmap to becoming a modern frontend developer in 2024. This path covers everything from the basics of the web to advanced frameworks and tools.

stages.title: Internet & Web Basics
stages.description: Understand the fundamental concepts of how the internet and websites work.

modules.title: How does the internet work?
modules.description: Learn about clients, servers, and network protocols.

modules.title: What is HTTP?
modules.description: Explore the protocol that powers the web, including methods, headers, and status codes.

modules.title: Browsers and how they work
modules.description: Understand the rendering process, DOM, and CSSOM.

modules.title: DNS and how it works
modules.description: Discover how domain names are translated into IP addresses.

modules.title: What is a Domain Name?
modules.description: Learn about domain registration and management.

stages.title: HTML
stages.description: Learn the structure of web pages.

modules.title: Learn the basics
modules.description: Master tags, elements, and attributes.

modules.title: Forms and Validations
modules.description: Create interactive forms for user input.

modules.title: Semantic HTML
modules.description: Write meaningful and accessible web content.

modules.title: Accessibility
modules.description: Ensure your websites are usable by everyone.

modules.title: Learn the basics
modules.description: Selectors, properties, and the box model.

modules.title: Flexbox
modules.description: A modern layout model for arranging items in a single dimension.

modules.title: Grid
modules.description: A powerful layout system for two-dimensional layouts.

modules.title: Responsive Design
modules.description: Adapt your layouts to different screen sizes using media queries.

modules.title: Animations
modules.description: Bring your site to life with transitions and keyframes.

stages.title: JavaScript
stages.description: The programming language of the web.

modules.title: Syntax and Basic Constructs
modules.description: Variables, data types, operators, and control flow.

modules.title: DOM Manipulation
modules.description: Interact with the HTML structure of the page.

modules.title: Fetch API / Ajax
modules.description: Make asynchronous requests to servers.

modules.title: ES6+ and Modular JavaScript
modules.description: Learn modern JavaScript features like Promises, async/await, and modules.

modules.title: Hoisting, Event Bubbling, Scope
modules.description: Understand core JavaScript concepts.

stages.title: Frameworks
stages.description: Choose a modern framework to build complex applications.

modules.title: React
modules.description: A popular library for building user interfaces.

modules.title: Vue
modules.description: A progressive framework that is approachable and versatile.

modules.title: Angular
modules.description: A platform for building mobile and desktop web applications.

modules.title: Next.js
modules.description: The React framework for production.
